rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GRACE ESTHER DITO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Heirship
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, there being no further objections. (Proof was filed that Donald John and Nancy Jean were children of Giovanni Dito, but not that Rosemary Dito is the only child of Donald John Dito or that Keith Littlejohn and Kevin Littlejohn are the only children of Nancy Jean Dito.) Documents supporting the interests of post-deceased heirs will need to be filed before final distribution (e.g., certified copies of Letters appointing the executor of a deceased heir's will).
